title: Bridge Essay: "Kundalini-like experience as psychopathology: A case series and brief review".

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through "Kundalini-like, experience, as, psychopathology:, A.

**"Kundalini-like experience as psychopathology: Acase series and brief review".** — Complement Ther Clin Pract. PMID: 33360561. DOI: 10.1016/j.ctcp.2020.101285. Kundalini concept comes from ancient yogic philosophy in which it is believed that certain spiritual practices will cause Kundalini awakening. The phenomenon of Kundalini awakening can sometimes mimic mental illness and results in difficulty for mental health practitioners to distinguish between them.
